notes: Mobile projection fix #2: the diagnostic revealed table was 5884px wide on a 597px viewport. With default table-layout: auto and width: max-content, the hidden cells were still contributing to width calculation. Fix: force table-layout: fixed on mobile + explicit percentage widths per column (first col 44%, value cols 18.66% each). Hidden cells now truly contribute zero width. Also unset position: sticky on first column TH on mobile (no horizontal scroll needed anymore), kept sticky on thead for vertical scroll.
